languages.text: "Как скажете, Ваша Светлость. Почту за честь услышать больше". {n}Голос Ведки, до того звонкий и полный внутреннего трепета, звучит глухо.{/n}
"As you say, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. I would be honoured to hear more." {n}Vedka's voice, once ringing and full of inner reverence, now sounds hollow.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Как скажете, Ваша Светлость. Почту за честь услышать больше". {n}Голос Ведки, до того звонкий и полный внутреннего трепета, звучит глухо.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "As you say, Your Lordship. I would be honoured to hear more." {n}Vedka's voice, once ringing and full of inner reverence, now sounds hollow.{/n}
"As you say, Your Lordship. I would be honoured to hear more." {n}Vedka's voice, once ringing and full of inner reverence, now sounds hollow.{/n}
"As you say, Your Lordship. I would be honoured to hear more." {n}Vedka's voice, once ringing and full of inner reverence, now sounds hollow.{/n}
"As you say, Your Lordship. I would be honoured to hear more." {n}Vedka's voice, once ringing and full of inner reverence, now sounds hollow.{/n}

languages.text: "Wie Ihr wünscht, Eure Lordschaft. Es wäre mir eine Ehre, mehr zu hören." {n}Vedkas einst klangvolle und ehrfurchtsvolle Stimme klingt mit einem Mal hohl.{/n}
languages.original_text: "As you say, Your Lordship. I would be honoured to hear more." {n}Vedka's voice, once ringing and full of inner reverence, now sounds hollow.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Wie Ihr wünscht, Eure Lordschaft. Es wäre mir eine Ehre, mehr zu hören." {n}Vedkas einst klangvolle und ehrfurchtsvolle Stimme klingt mit einem Mal hohl.{/n}

languages.text: « Vous avez sans doute raison, Votre Seigneurie. Mais je serais honorée d'en apprendre plus. » {n}La voix de Vedka, jusqu'alors sonnante et admirative, vous paraît désormais bien vide.{/n}
languages.original_text: "As you say, Your Lordship. I would be honoured to hear more." {n}Vedka's voice, once ringing and full of inner reverence, now sounds hollow.{/n}

traits.locale_text: « Vous avez sans doute raison, Votre Seigneurie. Mais je serais honorée d'en apprendre plus. » {n}La voix de Vedka, jusqu'alors sonnante et admirative, vous paraît désormais bien vide.{/n}

languages.text: «Como desee milord. Será un honor escuchar más». {n}La voz de Vedka, hasta hace nada sonora y llena de respeto, queda hueca.{/n}
languages.original_text: "As you say, Your Lordship. I would be honoured to hear more." {n}Vedka's voice, once ringing and full of inner reverence, now sounds hollow.{/n}

traits.locale_text: «Como desee milord. Será un honor escuchar más». {n}La voz de Vedka, hasta hace nada sonora y llena de respeto, queda hueca.{/n}

languages.text: "Nasıl derseniz Lord Hazretleri. Daha fazlasını duymaktan onur duyarım." {n}Vedka'nın bir zamanlar çınlayan ve derin saygıyla dolu olan sesi, şimdi boş çıkıyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: "As you say, Your Lordship. I would be honoured to hear more." {n}Vedka's voice, once ringing and full of inner reverence, now sounds hollow.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Nasıl derseniz Lord Hazretleri. Daha fazlasını duymaktan onur duyarım." {n}Vedka'nın bir zamanlar çınlayan ve derin saygıyla dolu olan sesi, şimdi boş çıkıyor.{/n}

languages.text: “您说得对，舰长大人。若能听您多讲讲，我将不胜荣幸。”{n}薇德卡的声音方才还很洪亮，饱含发自肺腑的敬意，此刻听起来却有些空洞。{/n}
languages.original_text: "As you say, Your Lordship. I would be honoured to hear more." {n}Vedka's voice, once ringing and full of inner reverence, now sounds hollow.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “您说得对，舰长大人。若能听您多讲讲，我将不胜荣幸。”{n}薇德卡的声音方才还很洪亮，饱含发自肺腑的敬意，此刻听起来却有些空洞。{/n}

languages.text: 「貴方の仰る通りでございます。もっとお聞きしたいと存じます。」{n}ヴェドカの声は、かつては響き渡り、内なる敬意に満ちていたが、今は虚しく聞こえる。{/n}
languages.original_text: "As you say, Your Lordship. I would be honoured to hear more." {n}Vedka's voice, once ringing and full of inner reverence, now sounds hollow.{/n}
